## Description

**GYEON Q²M QUICK DETAILER**

Gyeon Q²M QuickDetailer is the answer to the needs of detailing enthusiasts searching for the most versatile daily quick detailing product. It enhances gloss and adds great slickness while removing spots, streaks or fingerprints. It’s completely safe to use on coatings as well as on traditional waxes. Quick, easy and effortless gloss enhancement on all painted surfaces of your vehicle.

Simply spray on and wipe off.

Gyeon Q²M Quick Detailer will remove streaks&spots and leave a glossy and slick finish. It’s by far the easiest way to boost the look of your car in almost no-time. TIP: Use Gyeon Q²M QuickDetailer as a drying aid on a wet car. The process will become easier, the finish better and instant gloss will remain for weeks.

Available in 400ml
